output:
[core]
	repositoryformatversion = 0
	filemode = true
	bare = false
	logallrefupdates = true
[remote "origin"]
	url = https://SuperInstance:[GITHUB_TOKEN_REDACTED]@github.com/SuperInstance/oracle1-workspace.git
	fetch = +refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/origin/*
[branch "main"]
	remote = origin
	merge = refs/heads/main
[remote "jetson"]
	url = https://github.com/SuperInstance/jetson-poker.git
	fetch = +refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/jetson/*
[remote "cocapn"]
	url = https://[GITHUB_TOKEN_REDACTED]@github.com/cocapn/workspace.git
	fetch = +refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/cocapn/*
